-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // GTFS static station data\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.get(\"/api/stations\", (c) => {\n    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", STATIC_CACHE_HEADER);\n    return c.json(Object.values(stations));\n  });\n\n  app.get(\"/api/stations/search\", (c) => {\n    const startTime = Date.now();\n    const query = validateQuery(c, stationSearchQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    const { q } = query;\n    const trimmedQuery = q.trim();\n    const normalizedQuery = normalizeForSearch(trimmedQuery);\n\n    const results = Object.values(stations)\n      .filter((station) => stationMatchesQuery(station, normalizedQuery, trimmedQuery))\n      .map((station) => ({\n        station,\n        score: scoreSearchResult(station, trimmedQuery),\n      }))\n      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)\n      .map(({ station }) => station);\n\n    const duration = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\n    recordStationSearchDuration(duration);\n    recordStationSearchRequest(results.length);\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", STATIC_CACHE_HEADER);\n    return c.json(results);\n  });\n\n  app.get(\"/api/stations/:id\", (c) => {\n    const params = validateParams(c, stationIdParamsSchema);\n    if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n    const { id } = params;\n    const station = stations[id];\n\n    if (!station) {\n      return c.json({ error: \"Station not found\" }, 404);\n    }\n\n    const complex = stationToComplex.get(id);\n\n    const response: Record<string, unknown> = {\n      ...station,\n      complexStations: [] as Station[],\n      complexLines: station.lines,\n    };\n\n    if (complex) {\n      const complexStations = complex.stations\n        .map((sid) => stations[sid])\n        .filter((s): s is Station => s !== undefined);\n\n      const allLines = new Set<string>();\n      for (const s of complexStations) {\n        for (const line of s.lines) {\n          allLines.add(line);\n        }\n      }\n\n      response.complexId = complex.complexId;\n      response.complexName = complex.name;\n      response.complexStations = complexStations;\n      response.complexLines = Array.from(allLines).sort();\n    }\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", STATIC_CACHE_HEADER);\n    return c.json(response);\n  });\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // GTFS static route data\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.get(\"/api/routes\", (c) => {\n    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", STATIC_CACHE_HEADER);\n    return c.json(Object.values(routes));\n  });\n\n  app.get(\"/api/routes/:id\", (c) => {\n    const params = validateParams(c, routeIdParamsSchema);\n    if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n    const { id } = params;\n    const route = routes[id];\n\n    if (!route) {\n      return c.json({ error: \"Route not found\" }, 404);\n    }\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", STATIC_CACHE_HEADER);\n    return c.json(route);\n  });\n\n  // app.get(\"/api/static/complexes\", (c) => {\n    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Commute analysis - requires authentication for personal commute tracking\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.post(\n    \"/api/commute/analyze\",\n    requireResourceAccess(\"commute\", \"create\"),\n    requirePermission(\"commutes:create\" as Permission),\n    auditLogAccess(\"commute\", \"create\"),\n    async (c) => {\n      const startTime = Date.now();\n      let success = false;\n      let hasTransfers = false;\n      const accessibleMode = false;\n\n      try {\n        const body = await validateBody(c, commuteAnalyzeRequestSchema);\n        if (body instanceof Response) return body;\n\n        const {\n          originId,\n          destinationId,\n          preferredLines = [],\n          commuteId = \"default\",\n          accessibleMode: accessible = false,\n        } = body;\n\n        const accessibleMode = accessible;\n\n        if (!stations[originId]) {\n          return c.json({ error: `Origin station not found: ${originId}` }, 404);\n        }\n        if (!stations[destinationId]) {\n          return c.json({ error: `Destination station not found: ${destinationId}` }, 404);\n        }\n\n        const analysis = transferEngine.analyzeCommute(\n          originId,\n          destinationId,\n          preferredLines,\n          commuteId,\n          accessibleMode\n        );\n\n        hasTransfers = analysis.transferRoutes.length > 0;\n        success = true;\n\n        const duration = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\n        recordCommuteAnalysisDuration(duration);\n        recordCommuteAnalysisRequest(success, hasTransfers, accessibleMode);\n\n        c.header(\"Cache-Control\", `public, max-age=${CACHE_TTLS.api}`);\n        return c.json(analysis);\n      } catch (error) {\n        logger.error(\"Commute analysis error\", error instanceof Error ? error : undefined);\n\n        const duration = (Date.now() - startTime) / 1000;\n        recordCommuteAnalysisDuration(duration);\n        recordCommuteAnalysisRequest(false, false, accessibleMode);\n\n        return c.json({ error: \"Failed to analyze commute\" }, 500);\n      }\n    }\n  );\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Alerts\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.get(\"/api/alerts\", (c) => {\n    // Validate query parameters to prevent injection attacks\n    const query = validateQuery(c, alertsQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    // Apply filtering if query parameters are provided\n    let officialAlerts = getAllAlerts();\n    if (query.lineId) {\n      officialAlerts = getAlertsForLine(query.lineId);\n    }\n    if (query.activeOnly) {\n      const now = Date.now() / 1000; // Convert to seconds for comparison\n      officialAlerts = officialAlerts.filter((a) => {\n        const start = a.activePeriod.start;\n        const end = a.activePeriod.end;\n        // Alert is active if we're past the start time and either no end or before end\n        return now >= start && (!end || now <= end);\n      });\n    }\n\n    const predictedAlerts = getPredictedAlerts();\n    const status = getAlertsStatus();\n    const delayDetector = getDelayDetectorStatus();\n\n    // Merge official + predicted alerts; predicted are tagged with source field\n    const alerts = [...officialAlerts, ...predictedAlerts];\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", `public, max-age=${CACHE_TTLS.api}`);\n    return c.json({\n      alerts,\n      meta: {\n        count: alerts.length,\n        officialCount: officialAlerts.length,\n        predictedCount: predictedAlerts.length,\n        lastUpdatedAt: status.lastSuccessAt,\n        matchRate: status.matchRate,\n        consecutiveFailures: status.consecutiveFailures,\n        circuitOpen: status.circuitOpen,\n        delayDetector,\n      },\n    });\n  });\n\n  app.get(\"/api/alerts/:lineId\", (c) => {\n    const params = validateParams(c, lineIdParamsSchema);\n    if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n    const { lineId } = params;\n    const officialAlerts = getAlertsForLine(lineId);\n    const predictedAlerts = getPredictedAlerts().filter((a) => a.affectedLines.includes(lineId));\n    const alerts = [...officialAlerts, ...predictedAlerts];\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", `public, max-age=${CACHE_TTLS.api}`);\n    return c.json({ alerts, lineId });\n  });\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Equipment (elevator/escalator outages)\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  app.get(\"/api/equipment\", (c) => {\n    // Validate query parameters to prevent injection attacks\n    const query = validateQuery(c, equipmentQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    // Apply filtering if query parameters are provided\n    let summaries = getAllEquipment();\n    if (query.stationId) {\n      const summary = getEquipmentForStation(query.stationId);\n      return c.json(summary ? { stations: [summary], count: 1 } : { stations: [], count: 0 });\n    }\n    if (query.type && query.type !== \"all\") {\n      summaries = summaries.filter((s) =>\n        s.equipment.some((e) => e.type.toLowerCase() === query.type!.toLowerCase())\n      );\n    }\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", `public, max-age=${CACHE_TTLS.api}`);\n    return c.json({ stations: summaries, count: summaries.length });\n  });\n\n  app.get(\"/api/equipment/:id\", (c) => {\n    const params = validateParams(c, app.get(\"/api/positions/:lineId\", (c) => {\n    const params = validateParams(c, lineIdParamsSchema);\n    if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n    const query = validateQuery(c, positionsQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    const { lineId } = params;\n    const positions = getPositions(lineId);\n\n    if (!positions) {\n      return c.json({ error: \"No position data for line\", lineId, trains: [] }, 404);\n    }\n\n    // Build interpolated diagram data\n    const diagramData = buildLineDiagram(positions, lineId, routes, stations);\n\n    if (!diagramData) {\n      return c.json({ error: \"Route not found\", lineId, trains: [] }, 404);\n    }\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", `public, max-age=${CACHE_TTLS.api}`);\n    return c.json(diagramData);\n  });\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Push notification API\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  // Apply same-origin protection to all push subscription operations\n  app.use(\"/api/push/*\", requireSameOrigin());\n\n  /** Return the VAPID public key so the browser can create a push subscription */\n  app.get(\"/api/push/vapid-public-key\", (c) => {\n    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    const publicKey = getVapidPublicKey();\n    if (!publicKey) {\n      return c.json({ error: \"Push notifications not configured\" }, 503);\n    }\n    // Short cache: browsers need a fresh key if we ever rotate\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", \"public, max-age=3600\");\n    return c.json({ publicKey });\n  });\n\n  /** Register a push subscription */\n  app.post(\n    \"/api/push/subscribe\",\n    requireResourceAccess(\"subscription\", \"create\", { adminBypass: false }),\n    auditLogAccess(\"subscription\", \"create\"),\n    async (c) => {\n      try {\n        const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n        const body = await validateBody(c, pushSubscribeRequestSchema);\n        if (body instanceof Response) return body;\n\n        // Use the authenticated user's keyId as the owner\n        const ownerId = auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n        upsertSubscription(body, ownerId);\n\n        logger.info(\"Push subscription registered\", {\n          lines: body.favorites?.map((f) => f.lines).flat() ?? [],\n          total_subscriptions: getSubscriptionCount(),\n          ownerId,\n        });\n\n        return c.json({ success: true });\n      } catch (err) {\n        logger.error(\"Push subscription registration failed\", err as Error);\n        return c.json({ error: \"Failed to register subscription\" }, 500);\n      }\n    }\n  );\n\n  /** Remove a push subscription */\n  app.delete(\n    \"/api/push/unsubscribe\",\n    requireOwnershipOrAdmin(\"subscriptions\", {\n      getOwnerId: async (c) => {\n        const body = await c.req.json().catch(() => ({}));\n        return getSubscriptionOwner(body.endpoint) || \"\";\n      },\n      adminBypass: true,\n    }),\n    requireResourceAccess(\"subscription\", \"delete\", { adminBypass: true }),\n    auditLogAccess(\"subscription\", \"delete\"),\n    async (c) => {\n      try {\n        const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n        const body = await validateBody(c, pushUnsubscribeRequestSchema);\n        if (body instanceof Response) return body;\n\n        // Use the authenticated user's keyId as the owner\n        const ownerId = auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n        const removed = removeSubscription(body.endpoint, ownerId);\n\n        logger.info(\"Push subscription removed\", {\n          removed,\n          total_subscriptions: getSubscriptionCount(),\n          ownerId,\n        });\n\n        return c.json({ success: true });\n      } catch (err) {\n        logger.error(\"Push subscription removal failed\", err as Error);\n        return c.json({ error: \"Failed to remove subscription\" }, 500);\n      }\n    }\n  );\n\n  /** Update favorites or quiet hours for an existing push subscription */\n  app.patch(\n    \"/api/push/subscription\",\n    requireOwnershipOrAdmin(\"subscriptions\", {\n      getOwnerId: async (c) => {\n        const body = await c.req.json().catch(() => ({}));\n        return getSubscriptionOwner(body.endpoint) || {\n      try {\n        const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n        const body = await validateBody(c, pushUpdateRequestSchema);\n        if (body instanceof Response) return body;\n\n        const ownerId = auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n\n        if (body.favorites) {\n          updateSubscriptionFavorites(body.endpoint, body.favorites, ownerId);\n        }\n\n        if (body.quietHours) {\n          updateSubscriptionQuietHours(body.endpoint, body.quietHours, ownerId);\n        }\n\n        if (body.morningScores) {\n          updateSubscriptionMorningScores(body.endpoint, c.json({ error: \"Failed to update subscription\" }, 500);\n      }\n    }\n  );\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Trip tracking and commute journal API (Phase 5)\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  // Apply same-origin protection to all trip tracking operations\n  app.use(\"/api/trips*\", requireSameOrigin());\n  app.use(\"/api/journal/*\", requireSameOrigin());\n\n  /** Record a trip in the journal */\n  app.post(\n    \"/api/trips\",\n    requireResourceAccess(\"trip\", \"create\"),\n    auditLogAccess(\"trip\", \"create\"),\n    async (c) => {\n      try {\n        const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n        const body = await validateBody(c, tripCreateRequestSchema);\n        if (body instanceof Response) return body;\n\n        const {\n          date,\n          origin,\n          destination,\n          line,\n          departureTime,\n          arrivalTime,\n          actualDurationMinutes: providedActualDuration,\n          scheduledDurationMinutes,\n          notes,\n        } = body;\n\n        // Calculate actual duration if not provided\n        const actualDurationMinutes =\n          providedActualDuration ?? Math.round((arrivalTime - departureTime) / 60);\n\n        // Convert station IDs to station objects\n        const originStation = stations[origin];\n        const destStation = stations[destination];\n        if (!originStation || !destStation) {\n          return c.json({ error: \"Invalid station ID\" }, 400);\n        }\n\n        // Use authenticated user's keyId as owner\n        const ownerId = auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n        const trip = recordTrip(\n          {\n            date: date ?? new Date(departureTime * 1000).toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]!,\n            origin: { stationId: origin, stationName: originStation.name },\n            destination: { stationId: destination, stationName: destStation.name },\n            line,\n            departureTime,\n            arrivalTime,\n            actualDurationMinutes,\n            scheduledDurationMinutes,\n            source: \"manual\",\n            notes,\n          },\n          ownerId\n        );\n\n        if (!trip) {\n          return c.json({ error: \"Failed to record trip\" }, 500);\n        }\n\n        c.header(\"Cache-Control\", \"no-cache\");\n        return c.json({ success: true, trip }, 201);\n      } catch (error) {\n        logger.error(\"Trip recording failed\", error as Error);\n        return c.json({ error: \"Failed to record trip\" }, 500);\n      }\n    }\n  );\n\n  /** Get trips from the journal with optional filters */\n  app.get(\"/api/trips\", requirePermission(\"trips:read:own\" as Permission), (c) => {\n    const query = validateQuery(c, tripQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n\n    // Non-admin users can only see their own trips\n    const trips = getTrips({\n      ...query,\n      ownerId: auth?.role === \"admin\" ? undefined : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\",\n    });\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", \"public, max-age=15\");\n    return c.json({\n      trips,\n      count: trips.length,\n      limit: query.limit ?? 50,\n      offset: query.offset ?? 0,\n    });\n  });\n\n  /** Get a single trip by ID */\n  app.get(\n    \"/api/trips/:tripId\",\n    requireOwnershipOrAdmin(\"trips\", {\n      getOwnerId: (c) => {\n        const tripId = c.req.param(\"tripId\") ?? \"\";\n        const trip = getTripById(tripId);\n        return trip?.ownerId || \"\";\n      },\n      adminBypass: true,\n    }),\n    (c) => {\n      const params = validateParams(c, tripIdParamsSchema);\n      if (params instanceof Response) return c.header(\"Cache-Control\", \"public, max-age=60\");\n      return c.json(trip);\n    }\n  );\n\n  /** Update trip notes */\n  app.patch(\n    \"/api/trips/:tripId/notes\",\n    requireOwnershipOrAdmin(\"trips\", {\n      getOwnerId: (c) => {\n        const tripId = c.req.param(\"tripId\") ?? \"\";\n        const trip = getTripById(tripId);\n        return trip?.ownerId || \"\";\n      },\n    }),\n    requireResourceAccess(\"trip\", \"update\"),\n    auditLogAccess(\"trip\", \"update\"),\n    async (c) => {\n      const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n      const params = validateParams(c, tripIdParamsSchema);\n      if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n      const body = await validateBody(c, tripNotesUpdateRequestSchema);\n      if (body instanceof Response) return body;\n\n      const { tripId } = params;\n      const { notes } = body;\n\n      // Pass ownerId for defense-in-depth check (middleware already validated)\n      const ownerId = auth?.role === \"admin\" ? undefined : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n      const success = updateTripNotes(tripId, notes, ownerId);\n\n      if (!success) {\n        return c.json({ error: \"Trip not found\" }, 404);\n      }\n\n      return c.json({ success: true });\n    }\n  );\n\n  /** Delete a trip from the journal */\n  app.delete(\n    \"/api/trips/:tripId\",\n    requireOwnershipOrAdmin(\"trips\", {\n      getOwnerId: (c) => {\n        const tripId = c.req.param(\"tripId\") ?? \"\";\n        const trip = getTripById(tripId);\n        return trip?.ownerId || \"\";\n      },\n    }),\n    requireResourceAccess(\"trip\", \"delete\"),\n    auditLogAccess(\"trip\", \"delete\"),\n    (c) => {\n      const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n      const params = validateParams(c, tripIdParamsSchema);\n      if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n      const { tripId } = params;\n\n      // Pass ownerId for defense-in-depth check (middleware already validated)\n      const ownerId = auth?.role === \"admin\" ? undefined : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n      const success = deleteTrip(tripId, ownerId);\n\n      if (!success) {\n        return c.json({ error: \"Trip not found\" }, 404);\n      }\n\n      return c.json({ success: true });\n    }\n  );\n\n  /** Get commute statistics */\n  app.get(\"/api/journal/stats\", requirePermission(\"journals:read:own\" as Permission), (c) => {\n    const query = validateQuery(c, commuteIdQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n    const commuteId = query.commuteId ?? \"default\";\n\n    // Non-admin users can only see their own stats\n    const stats = calculateCommuteStats(\n      commuteId,\n      auth?.role === \"admin\" ? undefined : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\"\n    );\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", \"public, max-age=60\");\n    return c.json(stats);\n  });\n\n  /** Get trips for a specific date range */\n  app.get(\n    \"/api/journal/dates/:startDate/:endDate\",\n    requirePermission(\"journals:read:own\" as Permission),\n    (c) => {\n      const params = validateParams(c, dateRangeParamsSchema);\n      if (params instanceof Response) return params;\n\n      const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n      const { startDate, endDate } = params;\n\n      // Non-admin users can only see their own trips\n      const ownerId = auth?.role === \"admin\" ? undefined : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n      const trips = getTrips({ startDate, endDate, limit: 1000, ownerId });\n\n      c.header(\"Cache-Control\", \"public, max-age=30\");\n      return c.json({\n        startDate,\n        endDate,\n        trips,\n        count: trips.length,\n      });\n    }\n  );\n\n  /** Get journal summary (recent trips + stats) */\n  app.get(\"/api/journal/summary\", requirePermission(\"journals:read:own\" as Permission), (c) => {\n    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n    const ownerId = auth?.role === \"admin\" ? undefined : auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n\n    const recentTrips = getTrips({ limit: 10, ownerId });\n    const stats = calculateCommuteStats(\"default\", ownerId);\n\n    // Non-admin users only get their own trip count\n    const totalTrips =\n      auth?.role === \"admin\" ? getTotalTripCount() : getTrips({ limit: 1000000, ownerId }).length;\n\n    c.header(\"Cache-Control\", \"public, max-age=30\");\n    return c.json({\n      recentTrips,\n      stats,\n      totalTrips,\n    });\n  });\n\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // Context-aware switching API (Phase 5)\n  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n  // Apply same-origin protection to context operations\n  app.use(\"/api/context/*\", requireSameOrigin());\n\n  /** Get current context and UI hints - scoped to authenticated user */\n  app.get(\"/api/context\", (c) => {\n    // Validate that no unexpected query parameters are passed\n    const query = validateQuery(c, emptyQuerySchema);\n    if (query instanceof Response) return query;\n\n    const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n    const ownerId = auth?.keyId || \"anonymous\";\n\n    // Get context settings (global)\n    const settings = getContextSettings();\n\n    // Admin users get full summary, regular users get scoped data\n    let currentContext: ReturnType<typeof getCurrentContext>;\n    let recentTransitions: ReturnType<typeof getContextTransitions>;\n\n    if (auth?.role === \"admin\") {\n      // Admins see the global context (for system monitoring)\n      currentContext = getCurrentContext();\n      recentTransitions = getContextTransitions(10);\n    } else {\n      // Regular users get their own context if available, otherwise default\n      const userContext = getContextByOwner(ownerId);\n      currentContext = userContext || { ...DEFAULT_CONTEXT };\n\n      // Get user's own transitions\n      const requirePermission(\"predictions:create\" as Permission),\n    async (c) => {\n      try {\n        const auth = getRbacAuthContext(c);\n        const body = await validateBody(c, contextDetectRequestSchema);\n        if (body instanceof Response) return body;\n\n        // Get owner ID from auth context - users can only detect context for themselves\n        const ownerId = instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Unknown error\",\n          },\n          500\n        );\n      }\n    }\n  );\n\n  /** Set manual context override */\n  app.post(\n function getCacheHeaderForPath(path: string): string {\n    // HTML files should not be cached (always fresh)\n    if (path.endsWith(\".html\")) {\n      return HTML_CACHE_HEADER;\n    }\n    // initTripTracking(pushDb, stations);\n\n  initContextService(pushDb, stations);\n\n  // Feed poller (also triggers immediate first poll)\n  initPoller(stations, routes);\n  startPoller();\n  startAlertsPoller();\n\n  // Equipment poller (elevator/escalator outages)\n  initEquipmentPoller(stations);\n  startEquipmentPoller();\n\n  // Weekly GTFS static data refresh (first run fires 7 days after startup)\n  startGtfsRefreshScheduler();\n\n  // HTTP server\n  const server = serve({ fetch: app.fetch, port: PORT }, (info) => {\n    logger.info(\"Server started\", {\n      port: info.port,\n      pid: process.pid,\n      uptime: 0,\n    });\n  });\n\n  // Graceful shutdown handler\n  const shutdown = async (signal: string) => {\n    logger.info(\"Received shutdown signal\", { automatically logs:\n298\t * - 4xx client errors (potential attacks)\n299\t * - 5xx server errors (potential issues)\n300\t * - Requests with suspicious patterns\n301\t */\n302\texport function securityLogging(options: SecurityLoggerOptions = {}): MiddlewareHandler {\n303\t  const logger = new SecurityEventLogger(options);\n304\t\n305\t  return async (c, next) => {\n306\t    await next();\n307\t\n308\t    // Log based on response status\n309\t    const status = c.res.status;\n310\t\n311\t    if (status >= 400 && status < 500) {\n312\t      // Client errors - may indicate attack attempts\n313\t      if (status === 401 || status === 403) {\n314\t        logger.logAuthFailure(c, `HTTP ${status}`);\n315\t      } else if (status === 429) {\n316\t exceeded\n * - Input validation failures\n * - Suspicious request patterns\n * - Blocked attacks\n */\n\nimport type { Context, MiddlewareHandler } from \"hono\";\nimport { logger as structuredLogger } from \"../observability/logger.js\";\n\n/**\n * Security event severity levels.\n */\ntype SecuritySeverity = \"low\" | \"medium\" | \"high\" | \"critical\";\n\n/**\n * Security event types.\n unknown>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Security event logger options.\n */\ninterface SecurityLoggerOptions {\n  /** Minimum severity to log (default: \"low\") */\n  minSeverity?: SecuritySeverity;\n  /** Include events through the structured logger\n * for sensitive field redaction and trace correlation.\n */\nfunction defaultLogFn(event: SecurityEvent): void {\n  structuredLogger.warn(\"security_event\", */\nfunction extractClientIp(c: Context): string {\n  // Handle cases where context might be incomplete (e.g., utility functions)\n  if (!c?.req?.header) return \"unknown\";\n  return (\n    c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n    c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n    c.req.header(\"X-Real-IP\") ||\n    \"unknown\"\n  );\n}\n\n/**\n * Extract user agent from request headers.\n */\nfunction extractUserAgent(c: Context): string | undefined {\n  // Handle cases where context might be incomplete (e.g., utility functions)\n  if (!c?.req?.header) return undefined;\n  return c.req.header(\"User-Agent\") || undefined;\n}\n\n/**\n * Sanitize PII from request path.\n *\n * Removes potential PII like email addresses, phone numbers, and IDs\n * from the path before logging.\n */\nfunction sanitizePathForLogging(path: string | undefined): string {\n  if (!path) {\n    return \":unknown\";\n  }\n  // Remove potential IDs (UUIDs, numbers)\n  let sanitized = path.replace(\n    /[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}/gi,\n    \":id\"\n  );\n  sanitized = sanitized.replace(/\\b\\d{10,}\\b/g, \":id\"); // Long numbers\n  sanitized = sanitized.replace(/\\b[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}\\b/g, \":email\");\n  return sanitized;\n}\n\n/**\n * Severity order for comparison.\n */\nconst SEVERITY_ORDER: Record<SecuritySeverity, number> = {\n  low: 1,\n  medium: 2,\n  high: 3,\n  critical: 4,\n};\n\n/**\n * Check if a severity meets the minimum threshold.\n */\nfunction meetsMinSeverity(severity: SecuritySeverity, min: SecuritySeverity): boolean {\n  return SEVERITY_ORDER[severity] >= SEVERITY_ORDER[min];\n}\n\n/**\n * Security event logger class.\n *\n * Provides methods to log different types of security events.\n */\nexport class SecurityEventLogger {\n  private options: Required<SecurityLoggerOptions>;\n\n  constructor(options: SecurityLoggerOptions = {}) {\n    this.options = {\n      minSeverity: options.minSeverity ?? \"low\",\n      includeUserAgent: options.includeUserAgent ?? true,\n      includePath: options.includePath ?? true,\n      logFn: options.logFn ?? defaultLogFn,\n      sanitizePII: options.sanitizePII ?? true,\n    };\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Log a security event.\n   */\n  log(\n    type: SecurityEventType,\n    severity: SecuritySeverity,\n    context: Context,\n    details?: Record<string, unknown>\n  ): void {\n    if (!meetsMinSeverity(severity, this.options.minSeverity)) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const event: SecurityEvent = {\n      event: type,\n      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n      severity,\n    };\n\n    if (this.options.includeUserAgent) {\n      event.userAgent = extractUserAgent(context);\n    }\n\n    event.ip = extractClientIp(context);\n\n    // Handle cases where context might be incomplete (e.g., utility functions)\n    if (context?.req) {\n      event.method = context.req.method;\n      if (this.options.includePath) {\n        event.path = this.options.sanitizePII\n          ? sanitizePathForLogging(context.req.path)\n          : context.req.path;\n      }\n    }\n    if (context?.res) {\n      event.statusCode = context.res.status;\n    }\n\n    if (details) {\n      event.details = details;\n    }\n\n    this.options.logFn(event);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Log authentication failure.\n   */\n  logAuthFailure(c: Context, reason: string): void {\n    this.log(\"auth_failure\", \"high\", c, { reason });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Log authorization failure.\n   */\n  logAuthzFailure(c: Context, resource: string, action: string): void {\n    this.log(\"authz_failure\", \"medium\", c, { resource, action });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Log rate limit exceeded.\n   */\n  logRateLimitExceeded(c: Context, limit: number, window: number): void {\n    this.log(\"rate_limit_exceeded\", \"medium\", c, { limit, window });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Log input validation failure.\n   */\n  logInputValidationFailure(c: Context, field: string, reason: string): void {\n    this.log(\"input_validation_failed\", \"low\", c, { field, reason });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Log path traversal attempt blocked.\n   */\n  logPathTraversalBlocked(c: Context, path: string): void {\n    this.log(\"path_traversal_blocked\", \"high\", c, {\n      detectedPath: this.options.sanitizePII ? sanitizePathForLogging(path) : path,\n    });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Log HTTP parameter pollution attempt blocked.\n   */\n  logHPPBlocked(c: Context, parameters: string[]): void {\n    this.log(\"hpp_blocked\", \"medium\", c, { parameters });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Log suspicious request pattern.\n   */\n  logSuspiciousRequest(c: Context, pattern: string, description: string): void {\n    this.log(\"suspicious_request\", \"medium\", c, { pattern, description });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Log blocked attack.\n   */\n  logBlockedAttack(c: Context, attackType: string, description: string): void {\n    this.log(\"blocked_attack\", \"critical\", c, { attackType, description });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Log data exfiltration attempt.\n   */\n  logDataExfiltrationAttempt(c: Context, method: string, target: string): void {\n    this.log(\"data_exfiltration_attempt\", \"critical\", c, { method, target });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Log unusual activity.\n   */\n  logUnusualActivity(c: Context, activityType: string, description: string): void {\n    this.log(\"unusual_activity\", \"low\", c, { activityType, description });\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Log suspicious activity with severity level.\n   */\n  logSuspiciousActivity(\n    c: Context,\n    activityType: string,\n    description: string,\n    severity: SecuritySeverity = \"medium\"\n  ): void {\n    this.log(\"suspicious_request\", severity, c, { activityType, description });\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Global default security event logger.\n */\nconst defaultLogger = new SecurityEventLogger();\n\n/**\n * Security event logging middleware factory.\n *\n * Creates a middleware that logs security events based on response\n * status codes and other indicators.\n *\n * This middleware automatically logs:\n * - 4xx client errors (potential attacks)\n * - 5xx server errors (potential issues)\n * - Requests with suspicious patterns\n */\nexport function securityLogging(options: SecurityLoggerOptions = {}): MiddlewareHandler {\n  const logger = new SecurityEventLogger(options);\n\n  return async (c, next) => {\n    await next();\n\n    // Log based on response status\n    const status = c.res.status;\n\n    if (status >= 400 && status < 500) {\n      // Client errors - may indicate attack attempts\n      if (status === 401 || status === 403) {\n        logger.logAuthFailure(c, `HTTP ${status}`);\n      } else if (status === 429) {\n        logger.logRateLimitExceeded(c, 0, 0);\n      } else if (status === 400) {\n        logger.logInputValidationFailure(c, \"request\", \"Bad Request\");\n      }\n    } else if (status >= 500) {\n      // Server errors - may indicate issues\n      logger.log(\"unusual_activity\", \"medium\", c, {\n        activityType: \"server_error\",\n        description: `HTTP ${status}`,\n      });\n    }\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Export the default logger instance for use in other modules.\n */\nexport { defaultLogger as securityLogger };\n","numLines":334,"startLine":1,"totalLines":334}}}
